filters.q: newer_than:1h (debited OR credited OR "UPI txn" OR "payment successful" OR "transaction alert" OR "card used" OR "purchase of" OR "amount of Rs") -offer -discount -cashback -"pre-approved"
newer_than:1h (debited OR credited OR "UPI txn" OR "payment successful" OR "transaction alert" OR "card used" OR "purchase of" OR "amount of Rs") -offer -discount -cashback -"pre-approved"

values.content:
Extract financial transactions from these emails. For EACH transaction found, return a JSON array.

Emails:
{{ $json }}

For each transaction extract:
- date: YYYY-MM-DD format
- amount: numeric value (no currency symbol)
- merchant: merchant/payee name
- category: one of [loan, savings, insurances, mf_sip, stocks, home, bills, other, food, transport, shopping, entertainment, health, education]
- type: debit or credit
- source: bank or credit_card
- card_name: card identifier if mentioned (e.g., 'XX8005') or empty
- description: brief description of the transaction

Rules:
- Skip promotional emails, marketing, offers
- Skip emails that are just order confirmations without payment info
- Skip duplicate transactions (same date, merchant, amount)
- Date must be within last 30 days
- Amount must be a positive number

Return ONLY a valid JSON array. No explanation text.
Example: [{"date":"2026-02-10","amount":500,"merchant":"Swiggy","category":"food","type":"debit","source":"bank","card_name":"","description":"UPI payment for food delivery"}]
